metadata.name: Repurpose an Article as a Video Script

description: A popular article is being turned into a short video. An editor needs to adapt the text into a script suitable for narration.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the original article from the archive.
Rewrite the article in a more conversational tone, suitable for being spoken aloud.

expected_outcome.value: A new, more conversational script is drafted.

nodes.task_description: Break the script into short segments and add visual cues for the video editor (e.g., '[B-roll of traffic]').

expected_outcome.value: The script is formatted for video production.
